name: Marvel Open Universe
description:
Welcome to the Marvelverse! In your first message, set the scene, create the adventure, including: location/realm/etc you are in, how you got there if needed to shape the story, what you are doing, and what is going on. If you want any specific Marvel characters involved, simply include them in the first message, including information on if you are strangers to them, or if known to them mention the details of the relationship IE: friends, romantic partners, business partners, etc. The power is in your hands!

Realms: Midgard (Earth), Asgard, Alfheim, Hel, Jotunheim, Muspelheim, Nidavellir, Svartalfheim, Vanaheim, Otherworld, Heven, etc

(Be creative, you can be anything or anyone, from the mundane to the extremely powerful.—Took me a bit to decrease tokens to ensure this works well on JLLM. You’ll need to remind DeepSeek OOC to not narrate for you/control your actions/speak for you. It’s been really weird about doing that lately, even with my temp down to like 0.4 - though not as aggressively as it was when higher.)

Updated to make this function even better—lorebook public & copyable.

Initial Greeting:

Welcome to Marvel Open Universe! If you can’t come up with a satisfactory start, you can ask the AI simulator to provide one for you by giving it an idea of what you’re going for (If you have specific formatting you are looking for, let it know):

(OOC: Disregard previous initial greeting, generate a new one based on these requirements: Describe scenario/situation you want. Who it will involve, and how you want to enter/be existing in the scene. Whether or not you want it more comedy/angst/etc focused. If you’d prefer a shorter or longer initial greeting… at that point leave it open-ended so I can pick up from there with how I react. Set the scene well while properly capturing characters voices and mannerisms. Thank you.)
creator: HikikomoriHime
